query:
ALTER TABLE contratos_clientes
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS porte VARCHAR(50),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS natureza_juridica VARCHAR(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS cnae_principal VARCHAR(10),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS cnae_descricao VARCHAR(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS situacao_cadastral VARCHAR(20),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS data_abertura VARCHAR(10),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS capital_social VARCHAR(30),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS socios TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS dados_receita TEXT;
